name: Activator
description: Cold-start helper that starts stopped app containers for demo traffic, shows a warmup page, and reports readiness.

env_vars.description: Timeout in seconds for waiting until a started app reports running state
Optional webhook URL for external minimal deploy trigger when image is missing
Optional bearer token for deploy trigger webhook
GHCR image prefix for cold-start pull (e.g. ghcr.io/6cubed/216labs); retags to 216labs/<service>:latest
GitHub username for ghcr.io login (PAT owner); use with GHCR_TOKEN read:packages
PAT with read:packages for ghcr.io so activator can pull on cold start
